summary: WIN-002 detail_evidence already contains comprehensive engagement with the dome's evolution text defense. The text quotes the "Not contradictory. Complementary" defense verbatim, rebuts it with lossy cavity physics (effective acoustic height vs geometric height), demonstrates the H(r) supremum bound (8,537 km) that mathematically prevents reconciliation with 9,086 and 9,572 km, exposes the formula-switching between Schumann's globe formula and quarter-wave formula, and documents the Chapel Hill height self-inconsistency. All findings from the curmudgeon c2 review are already present. No expansion needed.
